Class OpenSearchVectorStoreProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.properties.CommonVectorStoreProperties
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.opensearch.autoconfigure.OpenSearchVectorStoreProperties
@ConfigurationProperties(prefix="spring.ai.vectorstore.opensearch") public class OpenSearchVectorStoreProperties extends CommonVectorStoreProperties
